summary: After breaking out of a week-long range, the trader holds a long runner and leans bullish. He expects ES to backtest the old resistance zone (7458-7465) and then continue higher toward 7515, 7530, and 7555. Line in the sand: 7458. Above it bulls are in control and new highs are possible; below it ES likely falls back into the prior range and needs more consolidation. Note: Monday is a holiday, so this plan applies to Tuesday.
